page: OVHcloud i1-180 is a storage-optimized server powered by an Intel x86_64 processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 2.2 GHz. It features 180.0 GB of RAM, yielding 5.62 GB per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor. A key hardware highlight is its local storage configuration, which bundles 7650 GB of NVMe SSD storage alongside an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is weak, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling in the bottom 25% and 10% respectively, and single-threaded compression tasks like gzip and bzip3 rating as poor. However, multi-core performance is average, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores. Memory bandwidth and Redis SET operations also perform within the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers high storage density and dedicated physical cores, making it a viable option for workloads requiring substantial local NVMe capacity without needing top-tier single-threaded CPU performance. It is well-suited for storage-heavy workloads, database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing tasks, whereas it is less optimal for single-threaded applications or intensive LLM text generation.
description: The OVHcloud i1-180 is a storage-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel x86_64 architecture running at 2.2 GHz. It is equipped with 180.0 GB of RAM, providing 5.62 GB per core, and a KVM hypervisor. The server's primary hardware feature is its substantial 7650 GB local NVMe SSD storage, complemented by an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data reveals a performance tradeoff: single-core CPU execution and single-threaded compression are weak, while multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently rank in the average tier. This hardware profile makes the server highly cost-efficient for storage-dense applications. It is best suited for databases, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing workloads that leverage its massive local storage capacity rather than demanding high single-core compute performance.
og_description: OVHcloud i1-180 is a storage-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel cores, 180 GB RAM, and 7650 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering balanced multi-core performance for database and storage workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud i1-180 is a storage-optimized server with 32 dedicated Intel cores, 180 GB RAM, and 7650 GB NVMe SSD storage for database workloads.
tagline: A storage-optimized server featuring thirty-two dedicated cores and over seven terabytes of local NVMe SSD storage for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel x86_64 physical cores running at 2.2 GHz
180.0 GB of system memory providing 5.62 GB per core
7650 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Average multi-core and database performance with weaker single-core speeds
Optimized for databases, static web serving, and storage-heavy applications
